name: radif_i2s_axis
description: Software-visible control and status registers for the bidirectional I2S to AXI-Stream audio bridge.

regions.name: radif_i2s_axis
regions.description: Controls I2S receive/transmit enables, generated clock dividers, LRCK framing, and transfer counters.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Control register for enabling receive and transmit datapaths and clearing sticky status.

fields.name: I2S_TO_AXIS_EN
fields.description: Enables conversion from I2S serial input to AXI-Stream output.

fields.name: AXIS_TO_I2S_EN
fields.description: Enables conversion from AXI-Stream input to I2S serial output.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Runtime status and static clocking mode flags.

fields.name: BUSY
fields.description: Indicates an RX frame is pending or a TX frame is loaded.

fields.name: ERR_STICKY
fields.description: Sticky configuration or runtime error flag.

fields.name: EXT_MCLK
fields.description: Core was elaborated for external MCLK mode.

fields.name: EXT_BCLK
fields.description: Core was elaborated for external BCLK/LRCK mode.

fields.name: NO_MCLK
fields.description: Core was elaborated with no generated MCLK output.

registers.name: mclk_div
registers.description: Generated MCLK half-period divider. MCLK toggles every mclk_div + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: bclk_div
registers.description: Generated BCLK half-period divider. BCLK toggles every bclk_div + 1 FPGA clock cycles.

registers.name: lrck_bits
registers.description: Number of BCLK rising edges per LRCK half-frame.

registers.name: rx_count
registers.description: Number of stereo frames emitted on the AXI-Stream output.

registers.name: tx_count
registers.description: Number of stereo frames consumed from the AXI-Stream input and shifted to I2S.
